factions.name: FLLC Collective
factions.role: Coordinates Operation Starshield from The Nexus and maintains launch-chain trust anchors.
factions.reputationEffects: High trust with FLLC unlocks emergency validators, reduced market fees, and launch-priority contracts.

factions.name: Sentinel Directorate
factions.role: Defensive incident-response specialists focused on relay integrity and infrastructure hardening.
factions.reputationEffects: Improves defensive rewards, grants patch automation modules, and lowers integrity decay during incidents.

factions.name: Corsair Guild
factions.role: Route-runners and exploit brokers controlling fast but dangerous convoy shortcuts.
factions.reputationEffects: Unlocks black-market route tokens and high-risk contracts with faster mission completion paths.

factions.name: Ghostline Network
factions.role: Stealth reconnaissance operators specializing in dark relays, silent pivots, and signal masking.
factions.reputationEffects: Reduces detection pressure, opens hidden intel contracts, and improves adversary trace previews.
